symbols.name: CompressionHelper
symbols.summary: Provides methods for compressing and decompressing data asynchronously.

parameters.description: The string to compress.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the compressed string in Base64 format, or null if the source is null.

parameters.description: The string to compress.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the compressed string in Base64 format, or null if the source is null.

symbols.name: DecompressAsync(string)
symbols.summary: Decompresses a Base64 encoded and compressed string asynchronously.

parameters.description: The Base64 encoded and compressed string to decompress.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous decompression operation. The task result contains the decompressed string, or null if the input is null.

parameters.description: The Base64 encoded and compressed string to decompress.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous decompression operation. The task result contains the decompressed string, or null if the input is null.

symbols.name: CompressAsync(byte[])
symbols.summary: Compresses a given string using GZip compression and returns the compressed data as a Base64 encoded string.

parameters.description: The string to be compressed.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The result of the task contains the compressed string in Base64 format, or null if the input was null.

parameters.description: The string to be compressed.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The result of the task contains the compressed string in Base64 format, or null if the input was null.

symbols.name: DecompressAsync(byte[])
symbols.summary: Decompresses a Base64 encoded compressed string asynchronously.

parameters.description: The Base64 encoded compressed string to decompress.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the decompressed string.

parameters.description: The Base64 encoded compressed string to decompress.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the decompressed string.

symbols.name: CompressAsync(Stream, Stream)
symbols.summary: Compresses the input stream asynchronously using gzip compression and writes the compressed data to the destination stream.

syntax.content: public static Task CompressAsync(Stream source, Stream destination)

parameters.description: The input stream to be compressed.
The stream where the compressed data will be written to.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous compression operation.

parameters.description: The input stream to be compressed.
The stream where the compressed data will be written to.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous compression operation.

symbols.name: DecompressAsync(Stream, Stream)
symbols.summary: Decompresses the given Base64 encoded string asynchronously.

syntax.content: public static Task DecompressAsync(Stream source, Stream destination)

parameters.description: The Base64 encoded string to decompress.
The stream where the compressed data will be written to.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the decompressed string, or null if the source is null.

parameters.description: The Base64 encoded string to decompress.
The stream where the compressed data will be written to.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the decompressed string, or null if the source is null.

symbols.name: CreateGZipCompressionStream(Stream, CompressionLevel, bool)
symbols.summary: Creates a gzip compression stream that writes compressed data into the destination stream.

syntax.content: public static Stream CreateGZipCompressionStream(Stream destination, CompressionLevel compressionLevel = CompressionLevel.Optimal, bool leaveOpen = true)

parameters.description: The destination stream that receives compressed data.
The compression level to use.
True to leave the destination stream open when the gzip stream is disposed.

returns.description: A writable gzip compression stream.

parameters.description: The destination stream that receives compressed data.
The compression level to use.
True to leave the destination stream open when the gzip stream is disposed.

returns.description: A writable gzip compression stream.

symbols.name: CreateGZipDecompressionStream(Stream, bool)
symbols.summary: Creates a gzip decompression stream that reads decompressed data from the source stream.

syntax.content: public static Stream CreateGZipDecompressionStream(Stream source, bool leaveOpen = true)

parameters.description: The source stream containing gzip-compressed data.
True to leave the source stream open when the gzip stream is disposed.

returns.description: A readable gzip decompression stream.

parameters.description: The source stream containing gzip-compressed data.
True to leave the source stream open when the gzip stream is disposed.

returns.description: A readable gzip decompression stream.

symbols.name: CreateZipEntryWriteStream(Stream, string, CompressionLevel, bool)
symbols.summary: Creates a writable stream for a single ZIP archive entry.

syntax.content: public static Stream CreateZipEntryWriteStream(Stream destination, string entryName, CompressionLevel compressionLevel = CompressionLevel.Optimal, bool leaveOpen = true)

parameters.description: The destination stream that receives the ZIP archive bytes.
The ZIP entry name to create.
The compression level to apply to the entry.
True to leave the destination stream open when the returned stream is disposed.

returns.description: A writable stream for the ZIP entry content.

parameters.description: The destination stream that receives the ZIP archive bytes.
The ZIP entry name to create.
The compression level to apply to the entry.
True to leave the destination stream open when the returned stream is disposed.

returns.description: A writable stream for the ZIP entry content.

symbols.name: OpenZipEntryReadStream(Stream, string, bool)
symbols.summary: Opens a readable stream for a single ZIP archive entry.

syntax.content: public static Stream OpenZipEntryReadStream(Stream source, string entryName = null, bool leaveOpen = true)

parameters.description: The source stream containing a ZIP archive.
The optional ZIP entry name to open. When null, the archive must contain exactly one file entry.
True to leave the source stream open when the returned stream is disposed.

returns.description: A readable stream for the ZIP entry content.

parameters.description: The source stream containing a ZIP archive.
The optional ZIP entry name to open. When null, the archive must contain exactly one file entry.
True to leave the source stream open when the returned stream is disposed.

returns.description: A readable stream for the ZIP entry content.
